name: media-os
description: The Media OS for Claude Code. 96 production-grade skills covering the entire media stack — FFmpeg complete (transcode, filters, streaming, HDR, color, broadcast MXF/IMF, DRM, 360°, VapourSynth), professional companion CLI tools (yt-dlp, MKVToolNix, GPAC, Shaka, HandBrake, MoviePy, MediaInfo, PySceneDetect, ffsubsync, ffmpeg-normalize, ImageMagick, ExifTool, SoX, GNU parallel, cloud upload), OBS Studio full stack (obs-websocket remote control, config authoring, C++ plugin SDK, Python/Lua scripting), streaming frameworks (GStreamer, MediaMTX all-protocol server), broadcast IP (NDI SDK, OpenTimelineIO editorial interchange, HDR dynamic metadata via dovi_tool + hdr10plus_tool, Blackmagic DeckLink SDI, gphoto2 DSLR tether), low-level control protocols (MIDI 1.0 + 2.0 UMP, OSC, DMX512/Art-Net/sACN via OLA, VISCA + ONVIF PTZ), system audio routing (PipeWire, JACK, Core Audio, WASAPI), VFX stack (Pixar USD, OpenEXR, OpenImageIO), computer vision (OpenCV, MediaPipe), WebRTC (W3C spec, Pion/mediasoup/LiveKit SFUs), and 2026 open-source AI era (Real-ESRGAN/SwinIR/HAT upscale, RIFE/FILM interpolation, rembg/BiRefNet/RVM matting, Kokoro/OpenVoice/Piper TTS, Depth-Anything/MiDaS depth, ComfyUI/FLUX-schnell/Kolors image gen, LTX-Video/CogVideoX video gen, LivePortrait/LatentSync lipsync, PaddleOCR/Tesseract 5 OCR, DeepFilterNet/RNNoise audio denoise, CLIP/SigLIP/BLIP-2/LLaVA tagging). Strict OSI-open + commercial-safe license filter on every AI model.
